    Sponsor

    Fund work on issues and help projects ship faster

    Written by Alexandre Magno
    Editar esta página

    Table of contents

    • Who this page is for
    • What you get from sponsoring
    • How it works at a high level
    • Next steps

    Who this page is for

    This guide is for individuals or organizations who want to sponsor tasks so contributors can work on them and get paid when the work is accepted.

    What you get from sponsoring

    • Faster delivery on important issues.
    • Transparent progress through the repository workflow.
    • Clear acceptance and payment conditions.

    How it works at a high level

    1. A task is created and funded.
    2. A contributor applies and is assigned.
    3. Work is submitted via Pull Request.
    4. Once accepted, payment is released.

    Next steps

    • Read Getting started
    • Understand How to receive payments
